name: Connect Biopharma Holdings Ltd
business: Connect Biopharma is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company advancing rademikibart, a next-generation antibody targeting IL-4Rα, for the treatment of asthma and COPD.

exposures.sentence: The Company is advancing rademikibart, a next generation, potentially best-in-class antibody designed to target IL-4Rα.

catalysts.event: Initiation of two Phase 2 clinical trials of rademikibart for acute exacerbation of asthma or COPD
catalysts.sentence: During the second quarter of 2025, we initiated two rademikibart Phase 2 clinical trials in patients experiencing an acute exacerbation of asthma or COPD.
